name: get_feishu_users
description: Get Feishu users by either (1) name search or (2) user IDs. Provide exactly one: queries [{ query, pageToken? }, ...] (1–20 items; pageToken per query for pagination), OR userIdsParam [{ id, idType }, ...] (1–50 items) to batch get by ID. Returns user list with basic info: open_id, user_id, name, department_ids, email, mobile, status, avatar, etc.

query.description: Search keyword (required).Matches display name and pinyin (full/partial/initials, case-insensitive). user_id is NOT matched—use userIdsParam.

pageToken.description: Pagination token (optional). Omit on first call; use page_token from previous response.

queries.description: Search by name. Each item: query + optional pageToken for that query. Min 1, max 20.

id.description: User ID value (open_id, union_id, or user_id per idType).

idType.description: ID type: open_id (per-app) | union_id (per-developer) | user_id (tenant). Default open_id.

userIdsParam.description: Get by ID list. Each item: id + idType. IDs may mix types.
